testcase.name: testRebalanceWithMultipleConsumers
testcase.system-out: 13:11:06.995 [main] INFO c.g.minikafka.server.KafkaServer - Starting KafkaServer on port 19093 13:11:07.016 [main] INFO c.g.m.server.network.SocketServer - SocketServer started 13:11:07.016 [kafka-acceptor] INFO c.g.m.server.network.Acceptor - Acceptor listening on port 19093 13:11:07.017 [main] INFO c.g.minikafka.server.KafkaServer - KafkaServer started successfully 13:11:07.328 [main] INFO c.g.minikafka.server.log.LogManager - Created new log for test-topic-0 13:11:07.329 [main] INFO c.g.minikafka.server.log.LogManager - Created new log for group-topic-0 13:11:07.330 [main] INFO c.g.minikafka.server.log.LogManager - Created new log for group-topic-1 13:11:07.330 [main] INFO c.g.minikafka.server.log.LogManager - Created new log for group-topic-2 13:11:07.330 [main] INFO c.g.m.s.controller.KafkaController - Created topic group-topic with 3 partitions 13:11:07.438 [main] INFO c.g.m.clients.network.NetworkClient - Connected to localhost:19093 13:11:07.440 [main] INFO c.g.m.clients.network.NetworkClient - Connected to localhost:19093 13:11:08.052 [main] INFO c.g.m.c.consumer.ConsumerCoordinator - Joining group rebalance-group, memberId= 13:11:08.059 [kafka-request-handler-963086904805750] INFO c.g.m.s.coordinator.GroupCoordinator - Member client-1 joined group rebalance-group, generation=1 13:11:08.354 [main] INFO c.g.m.c.consumer.ConsumerCoordinator - SyncGroup complete, assigned: [group-topic-0, group-topic-1, group-topic-2] 13:11:08.959 [main] INFO c.g.m.c.consumer.ConsumerCoordinator - Joining group rebalance-group, memberId= 13:11:08.960 [kafka-request-handler-963087811736708] INFO c.g.m.s.coordinator.GroupCoordinator - testcase.name: testProduceAndConsume
testcase.system-out: 13:11:11.100 [main] INFO c.g.m.clients.network.NetworkClient - Connected to localhost:19093 13:11:12.325 [main] INFO c.g.m.clients.producer.KafkaProducer - KafkaProducer closed 13:11:12.326 [main] INFO c.g.m.clients.network.NetworkClient - Connected to localhost:19093 13:11:12.327 [main] INFO c.g.m.c.consumer.ConsumerCoordinator - Joining group test-group, memberId= 13:11:12.328 [kafka-request-handler-963088718633166] INFO c.g.m.s.coordinator.GroupCoordinator - Member client-3 joined group test-group, generation=1 13:11:12.328 [main] INFO c.g.m.c.consumer.ConsumerCoordinator - Joined group test-group, memberId=client-3, generation=1, leader=client-3 13:11:12.328 [kafka-request-handler-963086294094583] INFO c.g.m.s.coordinator.GroupCoordinator - Group test-group stabilized at generation 1 13:11:12.329 [main] INFO c.g.m.c.consumer.ConsumerCoordinator - SyncGroup complete, assigned: [test-topic-0, test-topic-1] 13:11:12.334 [kafka-request-handler-963087206661333] INFO c.g.m.s.coordinator.GroupCoordinator - Member client-3 left group test-group 13:11:12.335 [main] INFO c.g.m.clients.consumer.KafkaConsumer - KafkaConsumer closed
